_meta.note: Macro event days -> SKIP (default) or RAISE_THRESHOLD. UNION_BUDGET dates are populated (Feb 1 from 2017; Feb 29 in 2016). RBI_MPC and US_FED_DECISION are INCOMPLETE — populate from RBI's published MPC schedule and the Fed's FOMC calendar (both released in advance) before the Phase 3 WF run. The filter mechanism is fully functional; missing dates simply mean fewer skip days.
_meta.source: RBI MPC schedule (rbi.org.in), Fed FOMC calendar (federalreserve.gov), Union Budget (indiabudget.gov.in)
